description: Legal document, damaged, perhaps regarding a partnership. Protagonists include Moshe ha-Kohen known as Abū ʿImrān. and Abū Saʿd b. Abū l-ʿAlā. Witnesses include [...] ha-Kohen b. Mevorakh, Moshe ha-Levi b. Ṣedaqa, and Yiṣḥaq b. Ghālib al-Ḥazzan. ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
